revision.comment: convert this to use [[Module:Protection banner]]; see [[Module talk:Protection banner#Proposal to convert all protection templates to use this module|here]] for details
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Protection banner|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 「[[Template:Pp-template]]」を保護しました: [[Wikipedia:保護依頼]]による: [[Wikipedia:保護の方針#半永久的な保護]]「[[Wikipedia:影響が特に大きいテンプレート|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]」 ([編集=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限) [移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Protection banner|main}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
</noinclude>

{{pp-meta |type={{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{#ifeq:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}-{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}|-sysop|move|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=semi |administrator |full |sysop=indef |move=move |#default=template}} |small={{{small|yes}}} |right={{{right|}}} |demospace={{{demospace|}}} |demolevel={{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}/{{NAMESPACE}}|{{SUBPAGENAME}}/{{ns:Template}}|{{{demolevel|undefined}}}|{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}|sandbox|sysop|{{{demolevel|undefined}}}}}}} |expiry= |dispute=no |icon-text=This {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:6}}|image, included in a high-risk template or message,|high-risk {{pp-meta/pagetype}} }} is permanently {{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{#ifeq:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}-{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}|-sysop|move|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=semi-protected from editing |move=move-protected |administrator |full |sysop |#default= protected from editing}} to prevent vandalism. |reason-text=This {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}} |{{ns:image}}=image, used in one or more [[w:en:Wikipedia:High-risk templates|high-risk templates]]{{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed= |administrator |full |sysop= and/or [[Special:Allmessages|system messages]], |#default=}} |#default=[[w:en:Wikipedia:High-risk templates|high-risk {{pp-meta/pagetype}}]] }} has been [[w:en:Wikipedia:This page is protected|{{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{#ifeq:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}-{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}|-sysop|move|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=semi- |move=move- |administrator |full |sysop |#default=permanently }}protected]]{{#ifeq:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}-{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}|-sysop|| from editing}} to prevent [[Wikidata:Vandalism|vandalism]]. {{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed= |administrator |full |sysop |#default={{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:image}}=
'''Do not move this image''' to [[commons:|Wikimedia Commons]].}}}} |categories={{{categories|{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:10}}|{{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{#ifeq:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}-{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}|-sysop|move|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=[[Category:Semi-protected templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]{{#ifeq:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}|sysop|[[Category:Move-protected templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} |move=[[Category:Move-protected templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] |administrator |full |sysop |#default=[[Category:Protected templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:6}}|[[Category:{{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=Semi-protected |administrator |full |sysop |#default=Protected}} images|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}}}} {{pp-template|categories=no}} {{pp-template|small=no}} {{Documentation}}

{{#ifeq:{{{small|}}}{{{expiry|ʁ}}}|yesʁ |
Image:Padlock.svg|20px rect 0 0 1000 1000 [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|This high-risk template or image included in one has been protected from editing to prevent vandalism]] desc none
|
[[Image:Padlock.svg|45px| ]] '''This {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}} |{{ns:image}}=image, used in one or more [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|high-risk templates]] or the interface, |#default=[[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|high-risk template]] }} has been [[Wikipedia:This page is protected|protected]] from editing to prevent [[Wikipedia:vandalism|vandalism]].''' {{howtoedit}} {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:image}}=:Note: This image should '''not''' be moved to commons}}
|} }}[[Category:Protected|{{{PAGENAME}}}]] {{ {{PAGENAME}} }} {{{{PAGENAME}}|small=yes}} {{{{PAGENAME}}|expiry=April 23, 2007}} ---- * Use {{tlx|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}} for the normal template * Use {{tlx|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|small=yes}} for just an icon at the top This template is not to be used as a bluff. '''''Only use it on FULLY PROTECTED pages.''''' Please note that only [[Wikipedia:Administrators|administrators]] can protect pages. [[Category:Protection templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: Refining demolevel defaulting scheme to enable the undefined case since, as I earlier forgot, templates cannot be passed parameters by ParserFunctions.
revision.text:

revision.comment: Adding in a quick hack that'll automatically set the demolevel to full for template sandboxes… I'd be interested in any comments you have about this.
revision.text:
{{pp-meta |type={{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=semi |administrator |full |sysop=indef |#default=indef}} |small={{{small|yes}}} |demospace={{{demospace|}}} |demolevel={{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}/{{NAMESPACE}}|{{SUBPAGENAME}}/{{ns:Template}}|{{{demolevel|undefined}}}|{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}|sandbox|sysop|{{{demolevel|undefined}}}}}}} |expiry= |dispute=no |icon-text=This {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:6}}|image, included in a high-risk template or message,|high-risk template}} is indefinitely {{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=semi- |administrator |full |sysop |#default=}}protected from editing to prevent vandalism. |reason-text=This {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}} |{{ns:image}}=image, used in one or more [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|high-risk templates]]{{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed= |administrator |full |sysop= and/or [[Special:Allmessages|system messages]], |#default=}} |#default=[[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|high-risk template]] }} has been [[Wikipedia:This page is protected|{{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=semi- |administrator |full |sysop |#default=}}protected]] from editing to prevent [[Wikipedia:Vandalism|vandalism]]. {{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed= |administrator |full |sysop |#default={{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:image}}=
'''Do not move this image''' to [[commons:|Wikimedia Commons]].}}}} |categories={{{categories|{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:10}}|[[Category:Wikipedia {{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=semi- |administrator |full |sysop |#default=}}protected templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:6}}|[[Category:{{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=Semi-protected |administrator |full |sysop |#default=Protected}} images|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}}}} {{pp-template|categories=no}} {{pp-template|small=no}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Adding feature: If the template is move-protected but not edit-protected, give a move-protection notice back instead of an error.
revision.text:
{{pp-meta |type={{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{#ifeq:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}-{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}|-sysop|move|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=semi |administrator |full |sysop=indef |move=move |#default=indef}} |small={{{small|yes}}} |demospace={{{demospace|}}} |demolevel={{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}/{{NAMESPACE}}|{{SUBPAGENAME}}/{{ns:Template}}|{{{demolevel|undefined}}}|{{#ifeq:{{lc:{{SUBPAGENAME}}}}|sandbox|sysop|{{{demolevel|undefined}}}}}}} |expiry= |dispute=no |icon-text=This {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:6}}|image, included in a high-risk template or message,|high-risk template}} is indefinitely {{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{#ifeq:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}-{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}|-sysop|move|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=semi-protected from editing |move=move-protected |administrator |full |sysop |#default=protected from editing}} to prevent vandalism. |reason-text=This {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}} |{{ns:image}}=image, used in one or more [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|high-risk templates]]{{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed= |administrator |full |sysop= and/or [[Special:Allmessages|system messages]], |#default=}} |#default=[[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|high-risk template]] }} has been [[Wikipedia:This page is protected|{{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{#ifeq:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}-{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}|-sysop|move|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=semi- |move=move |administrator |full |sysop |#default=}}protected]]{{#ifeq:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}-{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}|-sysop|| from editing}}}}} to prevent [[Wikipedia:Vandalism|vandalism]]. {{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed= |administrator |full |sysop |#default={{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:image}}=
'''Do not move this image''' to [[commons:|Wikimedia Commons]].}}}} |categories={{{categories|{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:10}}|[[Category:Wikipedia {{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{#ifeq:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}-{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}|-sysop|move|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=semi- |move=move- |administrator |full |sysop |#default=}}protected templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:6}}|[[Category:{{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=Semi-protected |administrator |full |sysop |#default=Protected}} images|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}}}} {{pp-template|categories=no}} {{pp-template|small=no}} {{Documentation}}

'''Do not move this image''' to [[commons:|Wikimedia Commons]].}}}} |categories={{{categories|{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:10}}|{{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{#ifeq:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}-{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}|-sysop|move|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=[[Category:Wikipedia semi-protected templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]{{#ifeq:{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:move}}|sysop|[[Category:Wikipedia move-protected templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}} |move=[[Category:Wikipedia move-protected templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] |administrator |full |sysop |#default=[[Category:Wikipedia protected templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:6}}|[[Category:{{#switch:{{{demolevel|{{PROTECTIONLEVEL:edit}}}}} |semi |autoconfirmed=Semi-protected |administrator |full |sysop |#default=Protected}} images|{{PAGENAME}}]]}}}}}}} {{pp-template|categories=no}} {{pp-template|small=no}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: convert this to use [[Module:Protection banner]]; see [[Module talk:Protection banner#Proposal to convert all protection templates to use this module|here]] for details
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Protection banner|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Protection banner|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

|

([{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=protect&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}} protection log]). {{howtoedit}} {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:image}}=:Note: This image should '''not''' be moved to commons}}
}}[[Category:Protected templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] ---- * Use {{tlx|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}} for the normal template * Use {{tlx|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|small=yes}} for just an icon at the top This template is not to be used as a bluff. '''''Only use it on FULLY PROTECTED pages.''''' Please note that only [[Wikipedia:Administrators|administrators]] can protect pages. {{protection templates}} {{in category|Protected templates}} [[Category:Protection templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

revision.comment: convert this to use [[Module:Protection banner]]; see [[Module talk:Protection banner#Proposal to convert all protection templates to use this module|here]] for details
revision.text: <includeonly>{{#invoke:Protection banner|main}}</includeonly><noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Categories go on the /doc subpage, and interwikis go on Wikidata. --> </noinclude>

{{#ifeq:{{{small|}}}{{{expiry|ʁ}}}|yesʁ |
Image:Padlock.svg|20px rect 0 0 1000 1000 [[Wikipedia:Protection policy|This high-risk template or image included in one has been protected from editing to prevent vandalism]] desc none
|
[[Image:Padlock.svg|45px| ]] '''This {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}} |{{ns:image}}=image, used in one or more [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|high-risk templates]] or the interface, |#default=[[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|high-risk template]] }} has been [[Wikipedia:This page is protected|protected]] from editing to prevent [[Wikipedia:vandalism|vandalism]].''' {{howtoedit}} {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:image}}=:Note: This image should '''not''' be moved to commons}}
|} }}[[Category:Protected|{{{PAGENAME}}}]] {{ {{PAGENAME}} }} {{{{PAGENAME}}|small=yes}} {{{{PAGENAME}}|expiry=April 23, 2007}} ---- * Use {{tlx|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}} for the normal template * Use {{tlx|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|small=yes}} for just an icon at the top This template is not to be used as a bluff. '''''Only use it on FULLY PROTECTED pages.''''' Please note that only [[Wikipedia:Administrators|administrators]] can protect pages. [[Category:Protection templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]

[[Image:Padlock.svg|45px| ]] '''This {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}} |{{ns:image}}=image, used in one or more [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|high-risk templates]] or the interface, |#default=[[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|high-risk template]] }} has been [[Wikipedia:This page is protected|protected]] from editing to prevent [[Wikipedia:vandalism|vandalism]].''' ([{{fullurl:Special:Log|type=protect&page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}} protection log]). {{howtoedit}} {{#switch:{{NAMESPACE}}|{{ns:image}}=:Note: This image should '''not''' be moved to commons}}
}}[[Category:Protected templates|{{{PAGENAME}}}]] ---- * Use {{tlx|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}}} for the normal template * Use {{tlx|{{lc:{{PAGENAME}}}}|small=yes}} for just an icon at the top This template is not to be used as a bluff. '''''Only use it on FULLY PROTECTED pages.''''' Please note that only [[Wikipedia:Administrators|administrators]] can protect pages. {{protection templates}} [[Category:Protection templates|{{PAGENAME}}]]
